## ⚠️ Data Quality Recommendations

| Priority | Dataset | Issue | Recommendation |
|---|---|---|---|
| Medium | `charging_sessions` | 3,162 nulls in extended columns | Impute with median or flag as optional in ML pipelines |
| Low | `charging_stations` | 215 nulls in metadata | Fill with 'Unknown' for categorical display |
| Info | `carbon` | 12,040 high-emission outliers | Retain — reflects real fleet variance; use IQR flag for segmentation |
| Info | `weather` | 2,194 precipitation outliers | Retain — monsoon season; use `Extreme_Weather_Flag` for conditioning |
